description: A key supplier is acquired by another company. A procurement manager must update the supplier records and understand any changes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is aware of the change.

nodes.task_description: Contact the new parent company to get updated contact and remittance information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the new supplier details.

nodes.task_description: Update the supplier record in the system with the new information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the supplier's master file.
